name: Mandarin Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken wings at the first joint and discard the tips.
2. Wash and dry the wings on paper towels, then sprinkle lightly with garlic salt.
3. Mix cornstarch, eggs, and water in a bowl to form a smooth batter.
4. Dip the wings in the batter and deep fry in oil until golden brown.
5. Set aside while making the sauce.
6. To make the sweet and sour sauce, select a pan large enough to coat all the wings evenly, such as a large electric frying pan.
7. Combine sugar, vinegar, water, soy sauce, and catsup in the pan. Bring to a boil, stirring occasionally.
8. As the sauce begins to thicken, add the wings and cook on medium heat until coated thoroughly with sauce.
9. Garnish with nuts if desired. A sprinkle of grated sesame seeds adds good flavor.
10. When scaling down for 15 wings, make the full sauce recipe and only scale the batter portion.
